prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to the penalties regime for benefit fraud and error managed by the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP), which primarily applies to England, Wales, and Northern Ireland. Scotland has its own social security system, thus this report does not apply to Scotland.
